Localization.Description: Password bruteforcing in the FreeIPA domain

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Attempts to bruteforce the password of account {subject.account.name} in the FreeIPA domain from host {src.host} on host {event_src.host}. Number of login attempts: {datafield2}.
The password of account {subject.account.name} in the FreeIPA domain is bruteforced from host {src.host} on host {event_src.host}. Number of failed login attempts: {datafield2}.
